title: Dr.Tech USB-A to USB-C Charging Cable - Durable Fast Charge & Sync USB 2.0 to USB Type C Data Cord - For Mobile Phones and Tablets - Black - 1M
features: [HIGH SPEED SYNC & CHARGE]: This Type C cable supports quick charge up to 5V/2.4A for devices and data syncing speed up to 480Mb/s.

[PERFECT LENGTH] : At a perfect length of 1, 2, 3 meter, this cable for Type C devices is ideal for both charging through wall charger or connectivity with a computer. It’s neither too long nor too short. Just perfect!

[HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL]: This charging cable features ultra strength connector joints offering a strain relief design made to endure up to 5,000 lifetime bends, allowing them to withstand the rigors of everyday use and last longer than the average cable.

[Advanced Safety Protection]: Built-in smart chip recognition functions plus intelligent temperature control system provides temperature control, surge protection, short-circuit prevention, preventing your phone from over charging and overheating thereby maximising the life of your battery.
[Compatibility]: Compatible with all the devices with a Type C connection.
description: Product Description USB-A to USB-C Charging Cable - Durable Fast Charge & Sync USB 2.0 to USB Type C Data Cord - For Mobile Phones and Tablets - White USB-A to USB-C Fast Charging, 60W power delivery Experience the ultimate in durability and performance with our USB A to USB C cable. Designed to meet the daily demands of charging and syncing your mobile devices, this cable is a versatile essential for both business and consumer applications. Key Features: Durable Construction Designed to prevent the connector from separating from the jacket, this cable features insulated conductors that reduce friction and enhance flexibility. Extra-Long Strain Relief Molding Tested to endure over 10,000+ bend cycles at a 180-degree angle, this cable offers exceptional strain relief, ensuring longevity and durability. Comprehensive Compatibility and Performance Supports all USB 2.0 specifications, delivering dependable data transfer and up to 60W of power to charge your devices efficiently. Why Choose Our iPhone15 Charger Cable: High Performance: Ensures your devices charge quickly and efficiently, saving you valuable time. Wide Compatibility: One cable for all your USB-C devices simplifies your tech accessories. Durability: Designed to last, reducing the need for frequent replacements. Convenience: The 1,2,3-meter length offers the perfect balance of reach and portability. Upgrade your charging experience with the iPhone 15 Charger Cable 60W, 1M Apple USB to Type-C Fast Charging Cable. Keep your devices powered up and ready to go, no matter where life takes you. Get up to 60W high-speed charging for all your USB-C devices when paired with a compatible USB-C charger. This cable supports 60W fast charging for various Type-C smartphones, tablets, and laptops, including MacBook Pro, iPad Pro (2020/2019/2018), Samsung Galaxy S20/S20 Ultra/Note 10/Note 10 Plus, and Chromebooks. Note: Charging speeds depend on your device and charger. Pair your USB-C devices with compatible USB-C chargers, such as 96W, 87W, 65W, 61W, 60W, 45W, 30W, and 18W USB-C Power Adapters. This is a USB to USB-C cable, meaning it has the same USB-C plug on both ends. Please note, this is not a USB to USB-A cable. Additionally, you may need a USB-C wall charger to charge your device effectively.
